title: Stone World
overview: Several thousand years after a mysterious phenomenon  turns all of humanity to stone, the extraordinarily intelligent, science-driven boy, Senku Ishigami, awakens from petrification. Facing a world of stone and the total collapse of civilization, Senku makes up his mind to use science to rebuild the world. Starting with his super strong childhood friend Taiju Oki, who awakened at the same time, they will begin to rebuild civilization from nothing. Depicting two million years of scientific history from the Stone Age to present day, the unprecedented crafting adventure story is about to begin.

title: King of the Stone World
overview: Facing immediate danger from wild animals Senku and Taiju are forced to revive Tsukasa Shishio "The Strongest High School Primate". Although Tsukasa has tremendous fighting ability and provides abundant food as their hunter, their new ally harbors an opposing view on restoring humanity.

title: Weapons of Science
overview: Senku does not trust the motivation of Shishio, so he will try to hide his plans from a new and unforeseen enemy for his plan to revive civilization.

title: Fire the Smoke Signal
overview: Senku has the idea of ​​creating gunpowder to have a way to balance the scale and have a chance to defeat Shishio. The production of gunpowder causes a fire. Shortly thereafter, Senku and the others discover smoke signals on the horizon. An accident? Hardly likely. Apparently there are other people in the stone world ...

title: Stone World The Beginning
overview: Shishio is determined to end Senku's life if he does not promise at that moment that he will abandon his idea of ​​recovering civilization as it was before the incident.

title: Two Nations of the Stone World
overview: Taiju and Yuzuriha figure out Senku's secret to reviving him. But now that he's back, they need to deal with Tsukasa.

title: Where Two Million Years Have Gone
overview: Kohaku shows Senku to her village, but it's going to take some convincing before they let him in. In the meantime, he makes friends with a like-minded, promising "sorcerer."

title: Stone Road
overview: Kohaku's sister, village priestess Ruri, is gravely ill. Senku, Chrome and Kohaku begin their quest to make antibiotics to save her life.

title: Let There Be the Light of Science
overview: Senku starts a ramen stand in hopes of winning over support for his kingdom of science, but some people are too principled to take such a bribe. Mentalist Asagiri Gen is not one of them.

title: A Flimsy Alliance
overview: Senku and his kingdom of science successfully test the first lightbulb since the collapse. Meanwhile, Asagiri Gen, a spy from Tsukasa's empire, is killed by an unknown attacker.

title: Clear World
overview: The development of glassworks, an important step for making sulfa drugs and for chemistry as a whole, turns out to have a surprising benefit for Suika.

title: Buddies Back to Back
overview: To make antibiotics, Senku and his kingdom need to obtain sulfuric acid from a fountain of the stuff. The team goes prepared, but there's no guarantee that they'll make it back alive.

title: Masked Warrior
overview: All that's needed to make antibiotics is alcohol. The best way to get some is to win the Grand Bout, which the Senku and his kingdom will also need to do in order to keep Magma away from Ruri and give her the drug.

title: Master of Flame
overview: After Magma's series of tricks to reach the final match, Chrome reveals a trick of his own! With a little extra help from Gen, Chrome just may be able to pull this one off!

title: The Culmination of Two Million Years
overview: After Senku's unlikely victory, quick marriage, and even hastier divorce, the kingdom of science is back to work to finally finish Ruri's medicine!

title: A Tale for the Ages
overview: Ruri reveals the origin of the village's name and Senku learns of his father's fate!

title: A Hundred Nights and a Thousand Skies
overview: Byakuya and the astronauts' story continues, and Senku's connection to Ishigami Village and the Hundred Tales is finally revealed.

title: Stone Wars
overview: Tsukasa's army is coming! Kinro struggles to hold the bridge against the deadly spearman Hyoga and his shock troops, but Senku and the villagers are ready with deadly new weapons of science!

title: To Modernity
overview: Hyoga is disarmed, but the kingdom of science is still in danger - Ishigami village is in flames! And Tsukasa will soon know that Senku is still alive... How will the villagers fight off the coming invasion?

title: The Age of Energy
overview: Work begins on creating the components for Senku's cell phone, but spinning gold wire is proving to be quite the task! Luckily, Chrome and Kaseki "invent" the water wheel and drastically improve the process!

title: Spartan Crafts Club
overview: With Chrome and Kaseki’s water wheel finished, Ishigami Village moves into the age of electricity! But with the primitive materials available to him, will Senku be able to create a filament that can withstand the intense heat of operating a vacuum tube?

title: The Treasure
overview: Senku, Chrome, and Magma venture into a cave in search of Tungsten, but there's a suspicious accident that leaves Senku and Chrome trapped at the bottom of a pit! What is Magma up to?!

title: Wave of Science
overview: Senku and the rest of the village get to work on making the components for the cell phone. It's hard work but everyone is pumped!

title: Voices Over Infinite Distance
overview: After a successful test of their new cell phone, Senku learns of a mysterious tale about a bee named Speaker who can play the voices of the dead.

title: Stone Wars Beginning
overview: Senku continues in trying to advance the Stone World, this time he makes "space food", it is in actuality cup noodles. After Senku finishes his project, Gen has an epiphany and devises a plan to take down Tsukasa's army without violence.

title: Hot Line
overview: While Senku's diversion buys Gen and others some time, soon Homura realizes something is not right.

title: Call from the Dead
overview: Taiju and Yuzuriha are on the verge of tears after they hear Senku's voice, and Senku informs them of his plan to win the war without any bloodshed.

title: Full Assault
overview: Chrome and Magma struggle with Ukyo, while Senku, gets his hands busy with building up an invention; a new hope.

title: Steam Gorilla
overview: The final touches to the automobile are made and it is used to transport the science supplies to a fortified cliffside that's close to the Tsukasa empire. From there the automobile is upgraded into a tank, but unbeknownst to the rescue group preparations by the empire have been made to counter any vehicular attack.

title: Prison Break
overview: Chrome must use all of his scientific knowledge to escape from his prison and save Senku and others.

title: Secret Mission
overview: Senku decides to use the Steam-Gorilla to capture The Miracle Cave. Using Lillian's recording, Senku gains the trust of more of Tsukasa's men. Ukyo reveals he saw Yuzuriha's secret mission to reassemble the fragments of statues Tsukasa destroyed.

title: Final Battle
overview: The Final Battle for the miracle cave starts as Senku and the Kingdom of Science conduct a frontal assault on the cave.

title: To Destroy and to Save
overview: Tsukasa and Hyoga are coming to capture the miracle cave. The Kingdom of Science must buy Senku and Chrome some time to turn the tide, or it is all over.

title: Humanity's Strongest Tag Team
overview: Senku demands a truce from Tsukasa in return for reviving his sister, Mirai, who Tsukasa comes to know is alive, but a new problem shows up when Hyoga shows his true self.

title: PROLOGUE OF Dr. STONE
overview: The Kingdom of Science is victorious, however it is not over for Senku. Senku must use all of his knowledge to cure Tsukasa who is severly injured.

title: NEW WORLD MAP
overview: While continuing to use the hot air balloon to search for the oil, it's decided that Ishigami Village needs to take up agriculture to prevent future food shortages, as well as to produce preserved food for their upcoming sea voyage.

title: Greed Equals Justice
overview: The Kingdom of Science will need rations to last them through their voyage to the other side of the world. But Senku, being no professional, burns all the bread he attempts to bake.

title: First Contact
overview: Senku, brings along a team to look for the Sagara Oil Fields. Meanwhile, Suika and Francois go truffle hunting.

title: Eyes of Science
overview: The morse code signal reading "WHY" saturates the airwaves too much for Ukyo to pinpoint a direction, so the Kingdom of Science works on a way to visualize the signal.

title: Science Vessel Perseus
overview: Kaseki's efforts to build the science vessel Perseus hit a roadblock when he realizes that it's impossible to get all the parts to fit in practice.

title: TREASURE BOX
overview: The Perseus crew are on their way to the treasure island, the birthplace of the Hundred Tales, where they hope to locate the treasure box left behind by the Soyuz crew.

title: Ray of Despair, Ray of Hope
overview: The Perseus arrives at the treasure island. A recon squad consisting of Senku, Soyuz, Kohaku, and Gen set off to locate the platinum and make contact with the islanders. Ukyo later discovers something on the seafloor and send Ginro to investigate.

title: The Trump Card Aboard the Science Vessel
overview: Amaryllis explains how she evaded petrification and how she came to her decision to sneak into the inner palace.

title: Beautiful Science
overview: Suika and Ginro work together to rescue the mobile lab from the Perseus. Reunited with Senku and the others, the group works on items to help Kohaku with the selection process.

title: SCIENCE WARS
overview: Amaryllis, Ginro and Kohaku are chosen to join the inner palace. The science team will need a way to communicate with them in secret, and, eventually, a way for them with the science team.

title: With This Fist, a Miracle
overview: Kohaku has located the treasure left behind by Byakuya and the others, but it's encased in concrete. Senku has to devise a plan to quietly get at the contents inside, so as to not alert the guards.

title: The Kingdom of Science's Counterattack
overview: Kohaku is forced to destroy Ryusui's statue to prove that she isn't a spy.

title: The Medusa's True Face
overview: The team revives Kaseki to work on the drone. Meanwhile, Ginro is called to see the Master.

title: Deal Game, Test of Wit
overview: More of the Kingdom of Science is brought back from petrification, but they are discovered in the cave by Moz.

title: Battle in Three Dimensions
overview: Moz and the Kingdom of Science form a tenuous, temporary alliance against Ibara. How long it will last is a question they can't afford to concern themselves with just yet.

title: Total War
overview: The Kingdom of Science attacks and tries to execute their plan to steal the petrification device. Moz convinces Kirisame to use the device, but Ryusui's instincts tell him something is off about the situation.

title: JOKER
overview: The Kingdom of Science members launch an attack on the islanders aboard the Perseus, but Moz isn't far behind and Senku and the others are forced to retreat inside the vessel. Ibara has them cornered, but Senku unleashes his Joker card.

title: Flicker of Doom
overview: Yo and the Kingdom of Science capture the petrification device, but Ibara isn't going down without a fight.

title: LAST MAN STANDING
overview: Much to Ibara's shock and dismay, Senku devised a plan and managed to escape petrification. Now the two enter into a head-to-head battle for control of the Medusa device.

title: FIRST DREAM
overview: Senku stands victorious. He then works on reviving the others and fixing their communications device, but while they are talking with Ruri they encounter a strong interference with the signal.

title: Treasure Island
overview: To the moon! That's the plan, at least. Senku and the Kingdom of Science need to devise a means with which to go to the moon and deal with Why-Man. The first step is allying with the people of Treasure Island and enlisting their help with some new crafts.

title: BEYOND THE NEW WORLD
overview: With the petrification device in the Kingdom's hands, it's time to revive Tsukasa. But there's just one problem: the device is out of batteries.

title: RYUSUI VS. SENKU
overview: Senku and his companions finally set off for America in search of corn. However, a dispute arises between Ryusui and Senku shortly after they depart.

title: SCIENCE JOURNEY
overview: Maintaining morale will be critical on the long journey to the Americas. Knowing where on the ocean you are is pretty important, too. The crew of the Perseus discuss.

title: Light Trap in the Darkness
overview: The Perseus lands in the Americas. They first head to Northern California in search of yellow dent corn, but discover a lot more than that.

title: Dr. X
overview: The search party narrowly escaped enemy machine gun fire. Unfortunately, the respite was short-lived.

title: DOCTOR VS. DOCTOR
overview: Tensions rise as Dr. Xeno makes his introductions to the Perseus.

title: SCIENCE IS ELEGANT
overview: Stanley orders Luna to infiltrate the Perseus and identify Doctor Taiju. Things go sideways when it turns out to be a little too easy.

title: The Two Scientists
overview: Senku had gotten his start in rocket building through an email exchange with Doctor Xeno. Their approaches to science soon diverged.

title: LOCK ON
overview: NASA scientist Dr. Xeno attempts to pick off the leader of the Kingdom of Science.

title: Light of Science
overview: With Senku having been shot, the Kingdom of Science plots its retaliation against Dr. Xeno.

title: Dirty Roads
overview: With Senku still confined to the bed, Chrome's team begins work on the tunnel to Xeno's base.

title: Those Who Know the Rules; Those Who Make Them
overview: Ryusui and Senku take to the skies in a science versus science dogfight while Xeno's forces mount a ground counterattack.

title: Reunion
overview: Xeno's army attacks and when all seems lost, Chrome and his friends finish the tunnel and capture Xeno.

title: Watching the Same Moon
overview: The team head to the source of the petrification beam in South America as they flee from Stanley's ship.

title: EARTH RACE
overview: Senku and company must flee from Stanley's ship, but they have to make stops to refuel.

title: The Escape
overview: With Stanley's ship hot on their tail, can science help Senku and company escape?

title: Medusa Mechanism
overview: The team is going to need a weapon for when Stanley inevitably catches up to them.

title: Sickening Yet Beautiful
overview: Senku and his team have lost Stanley for now, but they aren't out of — or rather, in — the woods just yet.

title: Diamond Heart
overview: The team discovers a giant pile of petrification devices. They take them apart to see what makes them tick.

title: Stone Sanctuary
overview: The team begins making, digging for, and polishing diamonds to replace the burnt-out ones inside the devices.

title: What I Once Sought to Destroy
overview: Suika is in charge of making sure Senku's plan works, but her kindness becomes an obstacle.

title: Our Dr. Stone
overview: With the revival team captured, it's up to Luna and Chelsea to revive everyone when the time comes.

title: Until We Meet Again
overview: With the petrification beam approaching, who will get their hands on the revival fluid?

title: Scientist, All Alone
overview: Suika gathers the team's statues, sets up camp and gets to work doing science.

title: Whole New World
overview: Suika attempts to create a revival liquid from scratch. Feeling lonely and anxious, she repeatedly fails, but finally manages to revive Senku!! As she revives her friends from the Kingdom of Science one by one and reunites with them for the first time in seven years, Senku discovers a terrifying secret hidden in the petrification device... And the moon landing plan to uncover Whyman's true identity is restarted, involving the entire world!!

title: Future Engine
overview: Senku and Dr. Xeno team up to gather the materials needed to make a rocket engine.

title: Fire
overview: The crew arrives in Spain, where they collect fluorite, olive oil and some treats.

title: The Universe Is Written in the Language of Mathematics
overview: The New Perseus sets out to India to recruit mathematicians for the space program.

title: Dawn of the Computer
overview: The computer that the team is building is a series of toroidal tubes. Senku explains.

title: The Truth About the Rocket
overview: The team gets to work wiring up several megabits' worth of memory donuts for their computer.
